description_long: This object depicts a highly abstracted adult pedestrian figure, characterized by elongated, angular limbs and exaggerated, stretched forms. The figure appears to be wearing a long, flowing garment with a hood or cap, reminiscent of a winter coat or robe, and the clothing drapes dramatically around the body. The head is small and partially obscured by the garment, while the arms and legs are extended in dynamic, almost surreal positions. The feet are visible and appear to be clad in simple shoes, with the lower limbs sharply jutting out from the main body. The overall form is fragmented and stylized, with sharp edges and irregular surfaces, giving it a distorted, almost digital glitch-like appearance. The object is primarily composed of large, flat surfaces with minimal detail, emphasizing its abstract and non-realistic nature.
description: A highly abstracted adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs, draped in a flowing garment and a hood or cap, rendered in a fragmented, stylized manner.
description_view_0: The figure is seen in a crouched or dynamic pose, with the head and upper body partially visible and the garment flowing outward.
description_view_1: The side view accentuates the extreme elongation of the limbs and the dramatic extension of the garment, with the head and feet at opposite ends.
description_view_2: From above, the angular, fragmented nature of the garment and limbs is most apparent, with the head and shoulders forming a central point.
description_view_3: This view highlights the back and side of the figure, showing the sharp, stretched forms of the garment and the irregular, jagged edges.
attribute_clothing_type: long hooded coat or robe with loose, draped fit
attribute_posture: dynamic, crouched or lunging pose with limbs extended
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by hood or cap
